parameters: If Lord Kudan were here, the Devil Dealer wouldn't stand a chance.
I wish I had the chance to see Lord Kudan's skills up close.
Leave the Imperial Palace and head toward the Third Empire?
Diana and Kudan got into a carriage and made their way to
The Third Empire's castle town began to come into view. Diana's gaze
unfocused as she thought back on all she'd been through thus far.
Being chased by the Eternal Dolls... Najezta settling things with his
brother Dorbeja... Deathpolca and Lily enjoying their friendship for
the first time in a thousand years...
The next day, they arrived at the castle town. The air was heavy
and ominous, unlike anything they'd felt before.
The Imperial Palace is off limits. Get lost.
